prompt: Icon design, deep black background. A TINY GLASS BABY CREATURE floats centered — a translucent cephalopod hatchling only 15mm long. Body is CLEAR and GLASSY with subtle COOL IRIDESCENT SHEEN across its surface — blue-green-violet shimmer like mother-of-pearl or opal, NOT warm amber. TWO ENORMOUSLY LONG THIN EYE STALKS rise from its head in a tall V, like snail eye stalks but stretched to comic proportion — stalks make up more than half the creature's total height — each tipped with a bright round eye. Eight fine trailing tentacles below. Calm, delicate, otherworldly. NOT a snail, NOT amber.
